steps.t: Selethryth is located north-west of the Mead Hall. Thane Sparhafoc wants you to speak with the people of Fenmarch to see if they have any information …
Further west of the Mead Hall, you will find Frethi. Thane Sparhafoc wants you to speak with the people of Fenmarch to see if they have any informatio…
Drytwald can be found further west from Frethi. Thane Sparhafoc wants you to speak with the people of Fenmarch to see if they have any information reg…
Tova is near the entrance to Fenmarch, to the west. Drytwald mentioned that Tova had recently seen a giant boar. You should speak with her.
After speaking with the people of Fenmarch, you found no evidence of Orcs, however this boar-skull totem might be worth examining. You should return t…
